headline: Wintrust to purchase Northern Trust guardianship services business
summary: CHICAGO, July 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northern Trust Corporation (NASDAQ: NTRS) and Wintrust Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: WTFC) today announced that Wintrust Private Trust Company, N.A., has entered into an agreement to purchase the guardianship services business of Northern Trust. The transaction is expected to close later this year. Terms of the transaction were not disclosed. Guardianship services are provided to individuals who are legally unable to manage their own affairs due to dis

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Northern Trust, Raises Price Target to $179.5
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Vivek Juneja   maintains Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $170 to $179.5.

headline: TirNua Low‑Carbon Infrastructure Mandate Might Change The Case For Investing In Northern Trust (NTRS)
summary: In late June 2026, TirNua Capital Partners announced that it had appointed Northern Trust to provide fund administration, depositary and banking services for its inaugural low‑carbon infrastructure fund, which secured €340 million in commitments at first close. This mandate underlines Northern Trust’s growing role in servicing sustainability-focused infrastructure funds, aligning its asset servicing capabilities with accelerating low‑carbon investment needs across Ireland and other OECD...

headline: Northern Trust Appointed to Support Invesco’s New Index-Tracking Mutual Fund Range
summary: DUBLIN, July 06, 2026--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) today announced it has been appointed by Invesco to provide administration, custody and depositary services for its new Irish-domiciled index tracking mutual fund range, Invesco Markets V ICAV.
